Name: 6xHis-tag
Notes: C-terminal or N-terminal; binds Ni-NTA resin

Name: 3xFLAG-tag
Notes: Triple FLAG for enhanced detection sensitivity

Name: HA-tag
Notes: 9 aa (YPYDVPDYA); derived from influenza hemagglutinin

Name: Myc-tag
Notes: 10 aa (EQKLISEEDL); recognized by 9E10 antibody

Name: V5-tag
Notes: 14 aa (GKPIPNPLLGLDST); derived from P/V-C protein of SV5

Name: P2A
Notes: 2A peptide from porcine teschovirus-1; ~98% cleavage efficiency; preferred for co-expression

Name: T2A
Notes: 2A peptide from Thosea asigna virus 2A; high efficiency cleavage

Name: E2A
Notes: 2A peptide from equine rhinitis A virus

Name: F2A
Notes: 2A peptide from foot-and-mouth disease virus

Name: SV40-NLS
Notes: Directs protein to nucleus; from SV40 Large T antigen (mammals/humans)

Name: NES-PKI
Notes: Leucine-rich NES from cAMP-dependent protein kinase inhibitor

Name: COX-VIII
Notes: Directs protein to mitochondrial matrix; from cytochrome c oxidase subunit VIII

Name: KDEL
Notes: C-terminal Retains soluble proteins in ER lumen

Name: LoxP-site
Notes: 34 bp Cre recombinase recognition site; used for conditional knockouts/inversions

Name: FRT-site
Notes: 34 bp Flp recombinase recognition site

Name: Puro
Notes: makes immune to puromycin for selection

Name: WPRE
Notes: Place after stop codon, but before poly A tail. Woodchuck hepatitis post-transcriptional regulatory element; enhances mRNA stability and nuclear export

Name: IAA7-degron
Notes: Auxin-inducible degron; rapid degradation with auxin/IAA addition, from plants

Name: SpyTag
Notes: (permanently bonds with SpyCatcher) Forms spontaneous isopeptide bond; used for modular protein assembly

Name: SpyCatcher
Notes: (permanently bonds with SpyTag) Forms spontaneous isopeptide bond; used for modular protein assembly

Name: pUC-ori
Notes: High copy bacterial ori (~500-700 copies/cell)

Name: f1-ori
Notes: Allows single-stranded phage rescue; present in many cloning vectors

Name: ColE1-ori
Notes: Medium copy ori; basis for pUC and many plasmid backbones

Name: AmpR
Notes: Ampicillin/carbenicillin resistance; most common bacterial selection

Name: KanR
Notes: Kanamycin resistance (bacteria); neomycin/G418 resistance (mammalian)

Name: PuroR
Notes: Puromycin resistance; fast selection (2-3 days)

Name: HygroR
Notes: Hygromycin B resistance

Name: GST_tag
Notes: Glutathione S-transferase; binds glutathione resin; large (~26 kDa)

Name: SUMO_tag
Notes: Enhances solubility; cleaved by SUMO protease leaving no extra residues

Name: Strep-tag-II
Notes: 8 aa; binds Strep-Tactin; gentle elution with desthiobiotin

Name: SBP-tag
Notes: Streptavidin-binding peptide; 38 aa; binds streptavidin

Name: cHS4
Notes: Can be used to wrap genes to prevent heterochromatin silencing

Name: MCS
Notes: Contains many restriction enzyme sites for easy custom directed insertions

Name: Plrigid
Notes: Rigid Peptide linker

Name: 10aa-TF-Linker
Notes: Flexible peptide linker designed for synthetic TFs

Name: Frieberg-Standard-Linker
Notes: Standard Protein Linker

Name: Short-linker
Notes: Standard Linker

Name: Medium-linker
Notes: Standard Linker

Name: Long-linker
Notes: Standard Linker
